description: Controls which transaction codes a user may start; checked implicitly by the kernel at transaction launch.
Restricts user administration actions by user group in SU01/SU10.
Restricts which authorization profiles a user administrator may assign.
Restricts which roles a user administrator may assign to users.
Controls which RFC function groups/modules a user may call remotely.
Controls trusted RFC relationships, restricting which calling systems/users may use a trust connection to impersonate their identity without re-authentication.
Controls generic table maintenance access by authorization group.
Controls table maintenance access restricted to specific named tables, narrower than S_TABU_DIS.
Controls goods movement authorization by plant and movement type in Materials Management.
Controls sales order access by sales organization, distribution channel, and division.
Controls sales order access by sales document type.
Controls financial accounting document access by company code.
Controls financial document posting authorization by document type.
Controls background job operations such as release, delete, and display by job owner and operation.
Controls ABAP development object access (programs, function modules, classes) by object type and activity.
Controls system administration functions such as client copy, spool administration, and background processing administration.
Analysis authorization object for embedded/BW-style analytics, restricting aggregated data visibility.
Controls access to activate/deactivate ICF (Internet Communication Framework) services in SICF.
Controls authorization to expose and access specific web/OData services via SICF.
Controls system administration authorization within CCMS/monitoring transactions.
Controls transport administration functions such as configuring transport routes and import queues.
Controls release and import authorization for individual transport requests.
The core HR authorization object restricting infotype access by personnel area, employee group, and subgroup.
Controls display access to change documents, relevant for audit trail review authorization.
Conceptual scope covering ESS/MSS self-service authorization patterns relevant to organizational-data-driven restriction design.
Illustrative custom Z-authorization object pattern for a bespoke finance release transaction, requiring an SU24 proposal entry to appear in PFCG.
The BTP equivalent unit of authorization - not a classic authorization object, but functionally analogous, defined per-application in xs-security.json.
The S/4HANA CDS view row-level restriction mechanism, functionally analogous to an authorization object but enforced at the database view layer.
Controls authorization for file system operations (read/write) performed from ABAP, relevant to interface and background job security review.
Controls authorization for calling external C-function based communication routines, a legacy but still-relevant interface security control.
Controls spool request access, relevant to sensitive output/print data security review.
